stemHtml: Inhaling carbon monoxide can be extremely dangerous during flying. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Carbon monoxide has no affinity to haemoglobin.
options.b: Carbon monoxide is odourless and colourless.
options.c: Carbon monoxide increases the oxygen saturation in the blood.
options.d: With increasing altitude the negative effects of carbon monoxide poisoning can be compensated for.
